nasb.text: Pharaoh’s heart was hardened, and he did not let the sons of Israel go, just as the Lord had spoken through Moses.

esv.text: So the heart of Pharaoh was hardened, and he did not let the people of Israel go, just as the Lord had spoken through Moses.

cnv.text: 法老的心剛硬，不肯讓以色列人離開，就像耶和華藉著摩西所說的。

ccb.text: 法老硬着心，不让以色列人离开，正如耶和华借摩西所言。
